About.title: OPERATOR PROFILE
About.bio: I am ICHOLA Rydwanoullah Koladé Alabi, a passionate graduate with a Professional License in Networks, Systems, and Cybersecurity in Benin. My goal is to become a Systems & Network Administrator with expertise in Cybersecurity and Pentesting.
About.vision_text: Constantly evolving towards advanced cybersecurity. I firmly believe in pushing limits, summarized by my motto: "Work Hard, Never Give Up". I am actively involved in designing secure architectures, network monitoring, and threat analysis.

stats.languages: Languages: C, Java, PHP, JS, SQL

timeline.degree: Professional License in Networks, Mobility and Security (RMS)
timeline.desc: In-depth training in system administration (Linux/Windows), advanced routing, security protocols, network programming, and SOC supervision.

timeline.degree: Academic Internship — IP Video Surveillance & Fire Security
timeline.desc: Installation and maintenance of IP camera video surveillance systems (network configuration, cabling, NVR setup) and deployment of fire security systems (detectors, alarm panels, evacuation plans).
Intensive practice in personal lab: IDS/IPS deployment, packet analysis, and ethical hacking initiation on dedicated learning platforms.

wazuh.title: Wazuh & Suricata IDS/IPS Deployment
wazuh.desc: Implementation of a complete monitoring environment with network intrusion detection via Suricata and centralized alert management with Wazuh.

soc.title: Personal SOC Lab
soc.desc: Virtual laboratory simulating a corporate infrastructure with firewalls (pfSense), Windows/Linux servers, and active event monitoring.

marketplace.title: E-commerce Marketplace Platform
marketplace.desc: Creation of a modern and secure online shop, preparing the future commercial integration of the 'Chariot' project.

CyberLab.title: CYBER LAB & SOC CONSOLE
CyberLab.subtitle: Log analysis, active network topology, and real-time attack simulations.
CyberLab.scan_complete: Scan complete. No critical ports open externally.

items.title: System Administration
items.desc: Installation, configuration, and security hardening of Linux servers (Debian, Rocky) and Windows Server (Active Directory, GPOs).

items.title: Network Administration

items.title: Defensive Cybersecurity
items.desc: Supervision, IDS/IPS configuration, security logs analysis, and server hardening.

items.title: Basic Pentesting
items.desc: Security audits of web applications and local network infrastructures, vulnerability scanning.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Designing modern, performant, and secure websites and applications with Next.js, React, and PHP.

items.title: Databases
items.desc: Modeling, optimization, and administration of PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite systems.

items.title: IT Support & Assistance
items.desc: Network troubleshooting, server incident resolution, and emergency corrective maintenance.

items.title: Training & Coaching
